name: Silver Spring Networks, Inc.
description: Silver Spring Networks, Inc. was a prominent provider of smart grid networking technology and solutions designed to enable the Internet of Things (IoT) for critical infrastructure. The company specialized in high-performance, secure wireless networking platforms that allowed utilities to modernize their energy grids and improve operational efficiency. In January 2018, Silver Spring Networks was acquired by Itron, Inc. for approximately $830 million. Following the acquisition, its technology and operations were integrated into Itron's portfolio, specifically forming the foundation of the Itron Networked Solutions business segment, which continues to drive innovation in smart city and utility management.
